meaning: n.农场周围的田园,耕地,内野
examples: Figo came infield from the left to score.
He put six fielders on the right side of the infield.
Farrell raced up the right touchline, dodged infield and curled a shot with his left foot.
The next batter, Kevin Youkilis, legged out an infield hit, giving the Sox life.
He had two infield hits and reached on a wild pitch after striking out.
